name: bounded-relay-notification-delivery
title: Bounded relay notification delivery
creator: panden
notes: Implemented bounded summary notification delivery with chunking, max three attempts, per-attempt timeout, dispatcher concurrency bound, delivery attempt persistence, summary job integration, and safe API delivery metadata.
